title: wyewye A3 Picture Frame, Frame for A3 Print, A3 Frame with Plexiglass and Mount, Picture Frames for Only Wall Mount, Solid Wood, White, Pack of 1
features: 🔲Generous Size: Elevate your larger prints and artworks with our A3 frame, perfectly tailored for 42x29.7 cm pictures. Its outer dimensions of 44.5x32.1 cm. The front display area, 41x28.7 cm, slightly smaller than A3, retains a sleek aesthetic, while the mount's display zone of 28.7x20.5 cm is ideal for A4 photos.

🔲Premium Craftsmanship: Crafted from high-quality pine wood, our A3 picture frame showcases a captivating wood grain, adding a touch of elegance to your modern interior. Designed for durability and aesthetic appeal, it's an ideal fit for showcasing your treasured memories and delicate artwork.

🔲Effortless Setup: Enjoy hassle-free installation with two pre-installed wall hanging hooks on the back panel. Included nails facilitate easy horizontal or vertical mounting, allowing you to effortlessly exhibit your photos in your preferred orientation.

🔲Durable Plexiglass Protection: Our shatter-proof plexiglass panels ensure utmost protection for your photos, resistant to compression and cracking. Simply remove the protective film from BOTH sides before use to unveil crystal-clear displays that stand the test of time.

🔲Versatile White Mount: The included white mount offers versatile display options. Highlight the central section of your A3 photo or present your A4 picture in full, both options ensuring an impressive presentation that complements your unique artistic taste.
